title: From 32-Inch Prototypes to Remote Lubrication — Unbound Gravel Tech Gets Wacky
content:
Unbound Gravel was upended this week by a prototype 32-inch gravel bike that last year's winner will race at the event, but that is not all that is unique about the gear this year.

Read the full article at From 32-Inch Prototypes to Remote Lubrication — Unbound Gravel Tech Gets Wacky on Velo.
author: Logan Jones-Wilkins
